message:
🐛 Add wsAuth mock to kubectlProxy tests (#10204) (#10208)

PR #10196 added appendWsAuthToken to kubectlProxy.ts but the three
kubectlProxy test files did not mock the new ../utils/wsAuth dependency,
causing 144 test failures. Add a passthrough vi.mock for wsAuth in each
test file.

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
